svg.text: Dense ER-style map with many entities, weak entities, keys, optional relations, and metadata panels

g.text: Weak entity: dashed dependent object table
Relationship: labeled diamond between entity anchors
Cardinality: endpoint labels remain outside entity cards
Dashed optional relation: recursive or optional relationship
Many tables should not make attribute text unreadable.
Relationship diamonds should remain between the connected entities.
PK and FK badges must stay inside the entity table card.
Scope: logical object relationship map, not physical database schema

svg.text: Stress template: many ER objects should keep key badges, relationship diamonds, and cardinality labels readable.
